name: environment_heat_dome_stresses_marrowbridge_rig_utl
premise: An illegal dump site sits on tribal trust land; county hazmat wants jurisdiction while the nation asserts sovereignty. In Environment, the situation tagged internally around environment heat dome stresses marrowbridge rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. Framing has already hardened externally as rights against utility; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Elliot Rahman
agents.identity: I am Elliot Rahman, the accountable executive on this bridge in Environment. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Nadia Kim
agents.identity: I am Nadia Kim, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Environment. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so utility does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so rights does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Elliot Rahman must choose under rights versus utility. What does Elliot Rahman do?
